prompts.label: Transparent blood orange slice motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Blood Orange transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a blood orange slice motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: One circular cross-section blood orange slice with translucent ruby-red flesh segments, deep crimson juice vesicles, a thin bright orange peel rim, pale pith cream ring, tiny citrus pores, and natural radial segment membranes. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, juicy citrus texture, unmistakably blood orange slice.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full round slice, peel, pith, radial segments, and slight natural irregularity without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no grapefruit, no tomato, no whole orange, no lemon, no plate, no knife, no hand, no props, no grove landscape, no text, no watermark, no second fruit species.
